name: dom-distiller
description: DOM compiler for LLM agents and Playwright automation. Distills a web page into a token-optimized AST of controls with stable locators, then converts the AST into Markdown tables and Playwright locators for Copilot/LLM consumption.

scripts.build: npm run bundle:injected && npm run compile:injected && npm run generate:script && npm run build:node
scripts.build:node: tsup src/index.ts --out-dir dist --format cjs,esm --platform node --dts --clean false
